revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-345

High strength friction grip bolt

High tensile bolt tightened to a high torque to join steelwork members together purely by friction, and not in shear or bending. The bolt is a loose clearance fit into its hole.

{{IALAFooter}}
